src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.general_idea: Add Javadoc comment block to the main application class to attribute authorship.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.human_impl: Added /** @Autor Nidhal Naffati */ before the class declaration.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.general_idea: Adjust indentation of the main method to use spaces instead of tabs for consistent code style.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.human_impl: Changed indentation from tabs to 4 spaces for the main method body.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Add Hibernate validation annotations to enforce data integrity rules on entity fields.
Enforce non-nullability on primitive wrapper fields using Jakarta validation annotations.
Switch from auto-increment to sequence-based ID generation for better database compatibility and control.
Change the ID field type from primitive long to Long object to support nullability and standard JPA practices.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.human_impl: private Long id; // was private long id

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Define explicit column constraints such as uniqueness and nullability for the registration number.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.human_impl: @Column(unique = true, nullable = false) private int registrationNumber;

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Configure JPA to store enum values as strings in the database instead of ordinal integers.
Establish a ManyToOne relationship with the Dealer entity and handle JSON serialization issues.
Introduce specific enum types for Car attributes to replace loose string or primitive representations.
Enable the Builder pattern for the entity class to facilitate object construction.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.4 to 3.2.1 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new com.mysql:mysql-connector-j required for Spring Boot 3.
Switch from explicit jakarta.validation-api to spring-boot-starter-validation to handle Jakarta namespace migration.
Add Flyway MySQL dependency for database migration management.
Add Flyway Maven plugin to execute database migrations during the build process.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype support for Java 8+ date/time API serialization.
Add Spring Boot Mail starter dependency for email functionality.
Explicitly add JUnit Jupiter dependency for modern testing support.
Add JUnit 4 dependency, likely for legacy test compatibility or specific vintage engine needs.
Add Spring Context Support dependency, often needed for MailSender or other legacy context features.
Remove Thymeleaf starter as the project appears to be moving towards a pure REST API approach.
Update the project artifact version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 1.02.02.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Updated the database connection URL to use a new database name and removed legacy JDBC parameters.
Removed unnecessary quotes from the database password configuration.
Changed Hibernate DDL auto strategy from 'update' to 'validate' to enforce schema consistency with migrations.
Switched Hibernate dialect from MySQL8Dialect to the generic MySQLDialect.
Enabled SQL formatting in Hibernate properties for better readability in logs.
Removed Thymeleaf template engine configuration as it is no longer used.
Added Flyway migration configuration to manage database schema changes.
Configured the server to exclude stack traces from error responses for security.
